about.subtitle: ABOUT ME
about.title: Who am I?
about.description:
I am a Software Engineer with more than 8 years of experience designing and developing scalable digital solutions for web and mobile platforms. I have worked in industries such as finance, transportation, and insurance, building modern applications focused on performance, scalability, and user experience.

My strongest expertise is backend development using NodeJS and NestJS, where I specialize in robust APIs, clean architectures, and scalable microservices. I also have experience with Angular, Flutter, and Swift.

Additionally, I hold an iOS Developer Certification from Backbase, strengthening my expertise in mobile solutions and enterprise application development.

I am passionate about creating modern, efficient, and high-impact digital products.
